summary: Complete testing of Record Detail Page for HoneyGroove vinyl collector platform. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: All UI components verified - hero section, stats grid, community owners, related posts (Hive Activity), spin logging, and navigation all working correctly.
passed_tests: GET /api/records/{record_id}/detail returns 200 with enriched data
Response includes: record, owner, community, market_value, related_posts
Record object includes spin_count, title, artist, year, format, discogs_id
Community stats includes total_owners, total_spins, wantlist_count, owners list
Owners list contains proper user info (id, username, avatar_url)
Related posts enriched with user info and post_type
Non-existent record ID returns 404 with 'not found' message
Invalid UUID format safely handled (returns 404)
SQL injection attempts safely handled
POST /api/spins logs spin and increments count correctly
Spin creates NOW_SPINNING post in related_posts
Record detail page at /record/:recordId loads correctly
Album art displayed correctly for records with cover_url
Title, artist, year (2012), format (Vinyl, LP, Album) displayed correctly
Discogs link present and opens https://discogs.com/release/{id} in new tab with rel=noopener
Stats grid shows: Your Spins, Community Spins, Collectors, Wanted
Community owners section shows 'In N Collection(s)' with user avatars
Related posts section shows 'Hive Activity' with post type badges (Now Spinning, Added, Note)
Log a Spin button visible when user owns the record
Log a Spin button works - increments spin count, shows toast 'Spin logged!'
Back button navigates to previous page (/collection)
Record detail page requires authentication - redirects to / when not logged in
Market value card NOT shown (expected - only shows when Discogs value data is cached)
seed_data_creation: Logged multiple spins to 'Red' by Taylor Swift during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Record Detail Page at /record/:recordId is fully functional. Tested with record ID 9ab0fbd2-ed43-472e-91b9-60ccbad4690d ('Red' by Taylor Swift). All data-testid attributes present: record-detail-page, back-btn, record-hero, record-title, record-artist, record-cover, stats-grid, spin-btn, record-owner-link, community-owners, related-posts, market-value-card. Note: market_value only appears when Discogs pricing data is cached in discogs_values collection - this is expected behavior.

hero_section.album_art: Working - displays cover_url or placeholder Disc icon
hero_section.title: Working - font-heading text-3xl/4xl
hero_section.artist: Working - honey-amber color, italic serif font
hero_section.discogs_link: Working - opens in new tab with rel=noopener

spin_button.visibility: Only shown when user owns the record

community_owners.content: Shows up to 12 owner avatars with usernames

related_posts.content: Shows up to 10 recent posts with user info and timestamps

market_value_card.visibility: Only shown when Discogs pricing data is cached
market_value_card.note: Not shown during tests - expected behavior

authentication.protected_route: Yes - redirects to / when not authenticated

mocked_api_note: No mocked APIs - all endpoints functional
